name: Johns Hopkins University
meets_full_need_notes: Johns Hopkins meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students. The Hopkins Financial Aid program provides substantial grant aid.
no_loan_notes: JHU includes loans in financial aid packages, though amounts are capped. JHU's loan cap policy reduces loans for students with demonstrated need. Not a full no-loan institution.

merit_thresholds.notes: JHU offers prestigious merit scholarships including the Hodson Trust Scholarship, National Merit Scholarships, and school-specific awards. Most merit awards are full-ride or near-full-ride for exceptional candidates. Selection is holistic.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive same need-based aid as RD. Binding commitment can be released if financial aid offer is insufficient.
appeal_policy: JHU reviews appeals for changed financial circumstances through the Office of Student Financial Services.
